title: Manpages: Missing example of `--ignore` flag in `podman ignore` manpage
body: `--ignore` is one of our nicer features for scripting, and it would be nice to include an example of it.

comments.body: would love to work on it!
@mheon Is this issue Title right ? there is no podman ignore command or manpage!
Oops. I believe this was supposed to be `podman rm`
